text:
> Inform your relatives and keep them as well informed as possible, they are very likely worried; plan to update them throughout the hospitalization
2 Inform your employer
> Notify the school if applicable (parent or child hospitalized)
> Arrange for watering the plants, caring for a pet, collecting the mail and keeping your home clean and aired …
> As the hospital is a shared living environment, be careful with your valuables …
> Keep your small comforts in the hospital: your favorite tea, a radio for the news, or headphones for your music, books, your nightwear or toiletries … think about arranging your personal space, of course in respect of hospital rules and consideration for other patients.

2/ Preparing the stay at

[Les

Many websites and videos are available on the internet: type "prepare for your hospitalization" into a search engine. In addition, the website of our hospital/clinic will also offer to facilitate the procedures.

“O3 HOSPITALIZATION
